abilities.description: Spend all of your mana and heal that much HP.Upgraded: Spend all of your mana and heal that much HP. Excess healing is converted into .

abilities.description: Drop to 1 HP. Gain mana equal to the HP lost. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Drop to 1 HP. Gain mana equal to the HP lost and gain All Stats Up 2. (Castable once per turn.)

translation.ru_description:
Опустите ОЗ до 1. Получите ману, равную потерянному здоровью.
[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]

Опустите ОЗ до 1. Получите ману, равную потерянному здоровью. Повышение Всех Характеристик 2.
[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]

Drop to 1 HP. Gain mana equal to the HP lost.

translation.en_upgraded_description:
Drop to 1 HP. Gain mana equal to the HP lost and gain All Stats Up 2.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

abilities.description: This spell gains +1 damage, range and area, and -1 mana cost each time you cast a spell. This spell resets after you cast it.Upgraded: This spell gains +1 damage, range and area, and -1 mana cost each time you cast a spell. This spell loses half its boosts after you cast it.

translation.ru_description:
Урон, дальность, область заклинания +1 а стоимости применения -1 каждый раз, когда используешь другие заклинания.
(Сбрасывает усиления после применения)
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Урон, дальность, область заклинания +1 а стоимости применения -1 каждый раз, когда используешь другие заклинания.
(Сбрасывает только половину усилений после применения.)
translation.en_description:
This spell gains +1 damage, range and area, and -1 mana cost each time you cast a spell.
This spell resets after you cast it.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
This spell gains +1 damage, range and area, and -1 mana cost each time you cast a spell.
This spell loses half its boosts after you cast it.

abilities.description: Summon meteors that hit random tiles in a large area. These meteors have a chance to stun, spawn fires, or leave rocks behind.Upgraded: Summon meteors that hit random tiles in a larger area. These meteors have a chance to stun, spawn fires, or leave rocks behind.
